final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing poster for the brand "RAN QIU", blending Eastern minimalist aesthetics with warm autumnal poetry.

Style/medium: flat editorial poster with ink-wash minimalist influence, inspired by Japanese wabi-sabi and Chinese literati painting restraint, photorealistic natural textures where needed
Composition: portrait orientation with generous white space, centered or off-center brand mark, shallow depth of field on natural elements, breathing room around every object
Subject: brand identity poster featuring the wordmark "RAN QIU" as the visual anchor, surrounded by sparse natural autumn elements — dried botanicals, fallen leaves, or a single branch with warm-toned berries
Scene/backdrop: near-white or soft #E8DCCB warm ivory background, evoking a quiet autumn afternoon, minimal props, poetic stillness
Lighting/mood: golden hour diffused light, warm and low-contrast, soft shadows, healing and tranquil atmosphere — no harsh edges
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn brick-red) as the dominant brand accent, #E8DCCB (warm ivory) as the expansive background, #D4A574 (golden amber) as secondary warmth; colors relate as earth tones in quiet harmony, no cool tones
Materials/textures: matte paper-like surface, subtle linen or rice-paper grain on background, organic textures on botanical elements
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: brand mark "RAN QIU" must be legible and prominent; color palette strictly limited to #8B3A1E, #E8DCCB, #D4A574 and their tonal variants; ample negative space must be preserved
Avoid: busy backgrounds, gradients that clash with earth tones, cold or blue-tinted light, over-decoration, generic floral stock photo aesthetic, neon or saturated colors
